### Resource Details

- **Resource Name:** 
- **Resource URL:** 
- **Category/Section** (e.g., Foundational Knowledge -> Mathematics): 
- **Free or Paid?** (If it has a paid version, please mention pricing details / free tier limits): 

### Description

Provide a brief description of the resource and why it is valuable to AI Researchers/Engineers preparing for interviews.

### Verification Checklist

- [ ] I have verified that the link works.
- [ ] This resource is not a duplicate.
- [ ] This resource is high quality and relevant to the directory.
- [ ] (If applicable) I have included pricing information.
